title: Amid War, Iran’s Soccer Leader Works to Get His Team to the World Cup
summary_full: Mehdi Taj said his federation has been dealing with FIFA, not the United States, in trying to obtain visas for Iran to play in the tournament that begins next week.
summary_public: Mehdi Taj said his federation has been dealing with FIFA, not the United States, in trying to obtain visas for Iran to play in the tournament that begins next week.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: dealing with FIFA, not the United States
